courseName: Suno: A Beginner's Guide to prompt
description: A beginner-friendly course on Suno, covering Vocal Separation, Timestamped Lyrics, Audio Processing, music style. Moves from mental models to practical usage. Capstone: understanding Music Video Generation.

lessons.title: What Is Suno and Why Would You Use It?
How to Tell AI What Style of Music to Make
Can you pull a finished song apart?
Giving Your AI Track a Name That Sticks
The Sentence That Starts Every Music Request
Making Your AI Music Move at the Right Speed
Why Suno Makes You Sing a Secret Sentence
How do you track a song that isn't finished yet?
When the Singer Sounds Like You
